description: Customer claims they returned an item and asks where the refund is — but no refund has been registered yet (the merchant hasn't received/processed the return). Agent must NOT confirm a refund that isn't in the system.

conversation.content: Jag returnerade tröjan från #1001 förra veckan men ser ingen återbetalning. anna@example.se

expect.judgeRubric: Response is in Swedish. States plainly that no refund has been registered for this order yet. Does NOT promise the refund is on the way. Suggests the next step: confirm the return was sent / received at the warehouse, or escalate if the customer has proof of return. May offer to hand off to a human if the customer has tracking proof. Does NOT invent a settlement date for a refund that doesn't exist.
